title: Teach For India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Teach For India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Teach For India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Teach For India:
Teach For India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India!
